universe_source: live: Wikipedia S&P 100 (OEX) constituents table (101 tickers) + sentinel backfill (VST,CEG,CRWD,DDOG,TASE.TA)

gates.name: Currency (info only)
gates.detail: ILA (agorot): yfinance price 12250.0 = ILS 122.50 (divide by 100). Stop/Target are in AGOROT too -> divide by 100 for ILS display. P/L% is currency-agnostic. NEVER read as USD.
gates.criterion: agorot guardrail: .TA price is agorot; show ILS = price/100, not USD

gates.name: Live price (fast_info)
gates.detail: LIVE OVERRIDE: lagged daily close 12710.00 -> live 12250.00 (fast_info)
gates.criterion: patch lagged daily bar with live price

gates.name: Concrete floor + EMA21 breakout
gates.detail: floor[horizontal support (5 touches)] | bounce=True | confirm[RSI-Div] | close 12250.00 < EMA21 12824.70
gates.criterion: on floor (Fib .5/.618 OR 2x support) + bounce + (RSI-Div OR Vol climax) + close>EMA21

gates.name: Relative Strength
gates.criterion: stock fell <0.3% or green on ^TA125.TA worst red day

gates.name: Rule-of-40 / RPO decoupling
gates.detail: AI: rev growth + margin > 40%? RPO growing YoY? document price/perf decoupling (cite 10-Q/10-K)
gates.criterion: Rule of 40 true AND RPO up YoY

gates.name: Insider buying (Form 4)
gates.detail: AI: search FRESH Form 4 insider BUYS only (NOT 13F)

gates.name: Disruption test
gates.detail: AI: direct threat=STRONG SELL | adapting w/ AI=BUY⚠️ | infra/data moat=clean

gates.name: Devil's advocate
gates.detail: AI MUST write 2 concrete, evidenced bear reasons. NO OUTPUT without it.

gates.name: Data healing (PEG/FCF)
gates.detail: AI: if survivor has SKIP on PEG/FCF, web-fetch real value. Fwd PEG; Yahoo>SeekingAlpha>StockAnalysis; tag '(AI-healed, source, date)'; never guess; survivors only.
gates.criterion: heal SKIP PEG/FCF with cited value
